ddls:
CREATE TABLE "household_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "q1_households" INTEGER /* Number of households in Q1 */,
  "q2_households" INTEGER /* Number of households in Q2 */,
  "q3_households" INTEGER /* Number of households in Q3 */,
  "q4_households" INTEGER /* Number of households in Q4 */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* Level of urbanization (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "census_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a census year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "quarter_description" TEXT /* Description of the quarter (e.g., January-March) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household data entry */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Income distribution of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., census, survey, administrative records) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., online, phone, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household data entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "template" TEXT /* Template for the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household data entry */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the data was requested */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of data request (e.g., download, visualization) */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the data request (e.g., pending, fulfilled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data request */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the data visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)
